title: Shashi Tharoor moves Delhi High Court to protect his personality rights
description: Congress Member of Parliament (MP) Shashi Tharoor has approached the Delhi High Court seeking protection of his personality rights. Justice Mini Pushkarna is scheduled to hear the matter on May 8 (Friday).Tharoor joins the long list of actors, cricketers and other notable personalities who have approached the High Court in recent years over their personality and public rights. Earlier, actors such as Anil Kapoor and Amitabh Bachchan have secured injunctions against unauthorised use of their
